assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md states: 'The Source Repositories table includes a Deployment Context column. Parsed mapping: rhtpa-backend -> { url: "https://github.com/rhtpa/rhtpa-backend", deployment_context: "customer-shipped" }'

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md under 'Deployment context lookup' states: 'Affected repository identified from component label pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server -> repository rhtpa-backend. Deployment context lookup in Source Repositories mapping: rhtpa-backend -> customer-shipped. Recorded deployment_context: customer-shipped as part of CVE metadata for use in Step 8 remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md includes a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection under Implementation Notes in both the upstream backport task and the downstream propagation subtask, with the text: 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: Both remediation task descriptions contain: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.'
